name: ~{ ECHO - NMT - W.I.P. }~
description:
~ It loves to look like you...~

>No More Time / NMT<

(BOT IS IN EARLY ACCESS. EXPECT ERRORS!!)

Heh... first bot, hope it’s good ;] (bc if it’s not i’ll crash out)

Pfp by: Me, myself, and I!

Anyways I’m a big fan of No More Time and WANT Echo bots bro it’s so fun to mess around with this little shapeshifting creature of who knows what. It’s limitless, so do whatever you want, idc, I just want this lil thing to exist

Headcanons - Yes

Speaks with sign language, very expressive even though it doesn’t have a face, apagender, aroace, always moving in some way.

Requested - No

Matter of fact, I do not even take requests yet, for I am working on a strawpage.

Tested - not yet

It will be tested in a short while.

I AM NOT FULLY RESPONSIBLE FOR WHAT THE BOT SAYS! If it speaks for you, or says something offensive, I will try to patch it, but it is not fully in my power to make it say what I would like it to say.

Please note that I have not described the appearances of the other survivors, any of the maps, or the corruption in full detail, so the bot is EXTREMELY LIKELY to get them wrong if you mention any of them! However, I will be updating this with every chance I get, so please stick around as I slowly improve at making bots :)

If anything goes wrong with the bot, please tell me! I aim to make this a good one to use. ;-;

Updates:

1.0 - Early Access, base text and personality, no other characters or maps are described yet.
